name: orca
description: Spawn Claude Code or Codex workers in cmux tabs from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Spawn Claude Code or Codex workers in cmux tabs.
interface.longDescription: Orca packages skills for launching AI coding workers from Codex into cmux tabs, handing each worker a focused brief and reporting the resulting surface.
defaultPrompt: Spawn a Codex worker for this task
Hand this bug to Claude Code in cmux
Launch a worker with a self-contained brief
